## About
- Name: Rahul NS Anand
- Summary: Rahul NS Anand. View Projects (/projects). Read Blogs (/blogs). Contact Rahul (/contact). Roles: Creator & BDFL - lyfie.org (2026 - Present). Founded Lyfie.org to build open-source products that make daily life and workflows simpler, faster, and better. Built and shipped a multi-product portfolio from zero: Papyra, Luthor, SantaClaw, and TickTrack. Owned product strategy, architecture, UI/UX, engineering, docs, and release execution end-to-end as creator and BDFL. Turned complex systems into simple products with fast iteration, strong DX, and real user impact.
